name: Email Filter + Summarize — Gmail fetch, Claude categorizes, save to Sheets
description: Fetches emails from Gmail, uses Claude AI to categorize and summarize each email (priority, category, action items), and saves the structured summaries to Google Sheets for tracking and analysis.

source.originalName: Automate email filtering & AI summarization. 100% free & effective, works 7/24

gmailListKey.description: Gmail connection key for listing emails

gmailGetKey.description: Gmail connection key for getting email details

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving summaries

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for summary notifications

spreadsheetUrl.description: Google Sheets URL to save email summaries (columns: Date, From, Subject, Category, Priority, Summary, ActionItems, Status)

gmailQuery.description: Gmail search query to filter emails

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of emails to process

categories.default: work, personal, newsletter, marketing, billing, notification, spam
categories.description: Comma-separated list of email categories to classify into

steps.name: Search Gmail for emails to process
Parse email list and extract IDs
Fetch email details in a loop
Compile all email data for AI processing
Run Claude AI to classify and summarize emails
Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Save email summaries to Google Sheets in a loop
Build Slack Block Kit email summary report
